dag.dag_name: Forecasting delay cascades into Purchasing/Replenishment recommendations

tasks.dependencies: Waits on upstream domain A DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Orders data across upstream domains

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_ORD_CASC' AS dag_id, 'consolidate_ord' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA
Notifies stakeholders of cascade impact with root-cause chain

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_ORD_CASC' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.incident_name: Forecasting delay cascades into Purchasing/Replenishment recommendations
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Orders pipeline (RTL_ORD_CASC): forecasting delay cascades into Purchasing/Replenishment recommendations.
incident.symptoms: The Purchasing/Replenishment recommendation DAG, gated on Forecasting's weekly scoring batch, is delayed 5h20m.
incident.root_cause: Forecasting's scoring batch failed on OOM (see LRJ Failure catalogue) and required a rerun with reduced batch size, and Purchasing has no intermediate/partial-results consumption path.
incident.business_impact: Weekly PO recommendations reach category managers late in the day, compressing the window to place orders before vendor cutoff times.
incident.resolution: Enable Purchasing to consume forecast results incrementally by SKU cluster as they complete, rather than waiting on the full weekly batch.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Forecasting's scoring batch failed on OOM (see LRJ Failure catalogue) and required a rerun with reduced batch size, and Purchasing has no intermediate/partial-results consumption path.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow lineage backend confirms the dependency edge and the specific rerun DAG-run ID that caused the delay
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog shows the OOM-triggered rerun timestamp on Forecasting DAG directly preceding Purchasing DAG's delayed start
expected_rca.resolution: Enable Purchasing to consume forecast results incrementally by SKU cluster as they complete, rather than waiting on the full weekly batch.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a 'partial-consumption-capable' flag to the metadata model for downstream DAGs, guiding architecture choices during DAG factory generation.
